title: dryopteris xanthomelas
intro: Dryopteris xanthomelas, commonly known as the Yellow Spleenwort fern, is a species of fern native to New Zealand and other parts of the world. It is a medicinal plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The therapeutic actions of Dryopteris xanthomelas include wound healing, anti-arthritic, and anti-cancer effects, which are attributed to its bioactive constituents such as flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids.
